title: Large Delivery Santa Sack 48x78 cm - Hessian Stocking Filler Gift Bag with Drawstring, Personalized North Pole Design Christmas Accessories, Beige W/White
features: 🎄 Large Size: Measuring 48 cm tall by 78 cm wide, this spacious sack is perfect for holding multiple Christmas presents, adding excitement to gift-giving.

🎅 Personalized Christmas Delivery Design: Features a fun "Christmas Delivery" print with a North Pole stamp and space to mention "To" the recipient with a "From: S. Claus" label for an authentic and magical holiday experience.
🎁 High-Quality Hessian Material: Made from durable hessian fabric, this sack is designed to withstand the weight of your Christmas gifts while providing a rustic, festive look.
🎀 Easy Drawstring Closure: Includes a secure drawstring closure for easy opening and closing, ensuring your gifts stay safe and secure.
♻️ Reusable and Eco-Friendly: A reusable option that can be enjoyed year after year, reducing waste and offering an eco-friendly alternative to traditional gift wrapping.
description: Detailed Description: Make your holiday gifting even more special with our Christmas Delivery Santa Sack ! This large gift sack, measuring 48 cm by 78 cm, is perfect for storing multiple presents, toys, and Christmas surprises. The delightful "Christmas Delivery" design features a North Pole stamp and space to personalize the "To" recipient and "From: S. Claus" label, adding a magical and personalized touch to your holiday celebrations. Crafted from high-quality hessian material, this gift bag is both sturdy and durable, making it suitable for carrying heavier gifts while maintaining its rustic charm. The drawstring closure ensures all your presents stay safely tucked inside, adding a decorative finishing touch with its easy-to-use design. This eco-friendly sack is reusable year after year, offering a sustainable alternative to wrapping paper, helping you reduce waste and contribute to a greener Christmas. Perfect for kids and adults alike, this Santa-approved sack will make your gift-giving experience even more magical! SHATCHI is the market leading supplier of everything you need to make your Christmas as beautiful as ever! From Christmas Trees, indoor and outdoor lights and decorations, to Christmas ornaments such as nutcrackers, festive train sets and candle bridges, the SHATCHI has everything you need to decorate your home today .
